  cardRegex: '/(\\d{4})(\\d{4})(\\d{4})(\\d{4})/',
  carousel: [] as propsData[],
  modality: '',
  highlightColorBenefitModality: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
  highlightColorBenefitBox: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02',
  highlightColorBenefitText: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01',
};

const useContents = (
  handleCheckExemptionEligibility?: HandleCheckExemptionEligibilityProps,
) => {
  const contents = useAppSelector(rootState => {
    const {
      productsReducer,
      contentsReducer,
      exemptionEligibilityReducer,
      featuresReducer,
    } = rootState;

    const { data: contentsReducerData } = contentsReducer;

    const currentContent = (() => {
      const firstProduct = productsReducer.data[0];
      if (!firstProduct) return null;
      const firstProductLogoNumber = Number(firstProduct.Logo);
      return contentsReducerData.find(
        content => firstProductLogoNumber === Number(content.codPlano),
      );
    })();

    if (!currentContent) return defaultValues;

    const {
      benefits,
      nome,
      corPlano,
      imagens,
      cardMask,
      cardRegex,
      cardRegexReplace,
      highlightColorBenefitBox,
      highlightColorBenefitModality,
      highlightColorBenefitText,
      modality,
    } = currentContent;

    const { hasExemptionEligible } = handleCheckExemptionEligibility?.({
      contentsReducer,
      productsReducer,
      exemptionEligibilityReducer,
      featuresReducer,
    }) ?? {
      hasExemptionEligible: false,
      hasProductsDataAccount: false,
    };

    const filteredBenefits = (() => {
      if (hasExemptionEligible) return benefits;
      const { MONTHLY_FEE_EXEMPTION, ...filtered } = benefits;
      return filtered;
    })();

    return {
      benefits: filteredBenefits,
      nome,
      corPlano,
      imagens,
      cardMask,
      cardRegex,
      cardRegexReplace,
      highlightColorBenefitBox,
      highlightColorBenefitModality,
      highlightColorBenefitText,
      modality,
    };
  });

  useCachedImage({
    cacheKey: '@SemPararCachedImage',
    options: {
      preLoadAllImages: true,
    },
  });

  return contents;
};

export default useContents;

export function usePreventDoubleClick<T extends object[]>(
  callback: (..._args: T) => Promise<void> | void,
  options: UsePreventDoubleClickOptions = {},
): UsePreventDoubleClickReturn<T> {
  const { delay = 1000, onDoubleClickAttempt } = options;

  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
  const timeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const lastExecutionRef = useRef<number>(0);

  const executeWithPreventDoubleClick = useCallback(
    async (...args: T) => {
      const now = Date.now();

      if (now - lastExecutionRef.current < delay || isProcessing) {
        onDoubleClickAttempt?.();
        return;
      }

      try {
        setIsProcessing(true);
        lastExecutionRef.current = now;

        await callback(...args);
      } finally {
        if (timeoutRef.current) {
          clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);
        }

        timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
          setIsProcessing(false);
        }, delay);
      }
    },
    [callback, delay, onDoubleClickAttempt, isProcessing],
  );

  const reset = useCallback(() => {
    setIsProcessing(false);
    lastExecutionRef.current = 0;
    if (timeoutRef.current) {
      clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);
      timeoutRef.current = null;
    }
  }, []);

  return {
    executeWithPreventDoubleClick,
    isProcessing,
    reset,
  };
}

import { Platform, Share as RNShare } from 'react-native';
import RNFS from 'react-native-fs';
import Share from 'react-native-share';
import { useDispatch } from 'react-redux';

import {
  DownloadInvoiceActions,
  DownloadInvoiceTypes,
} from '../redux/ducks/downloadInvoice';

export interface UseShareMediaReturn {
  handleShare: (_date: string) => Promise<void>;
  isLoading: boolean;
  isError: boolean;
}

export type FileType = 'pdf' | 'png' | 'jpg' | 'jpeg';

const urlEncoderType: Record<FileType, string> = {
  pdf: 'application/pdf',
  jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
  jpg: 'image/jpg',
  png: 'image/png',
};

export const useShareMedia = ({
  fileName,
  fileType,
}: {
  fileName: string;
  fileType: FileType;
}): UseShareMediaReturn => {
  const [isError, setIsError] = useState(false);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const dispatch = useDispatch();

  const invoiceDownloadRequest = useCallback<
    DownloadInvoiceActions['downloadInvoiceRequest']
  >(
    (cpf, date, callBack, openFile) =>
      dispatch({
        type: DownloadInvoiceTypes.REQUEST,
        cpf,
        date,
        callBack,
        openFile,
      }),
    [],
  );

  const handleShare = async (date: string) => {
    setIsLoading(true);

    try {
      const path = `${RNFS.DocumentDirectoryPath}/${fileName}.${fileType}`;

      const content = {
        title: fileName,
        message: fileName,
      };

      invoiceDownloadRequest(
        '',
        date,
        async ({ base64 }) => {
          await RNFS.writeFile(path, base64, 'base64').catch(error => {
            throw new Error(`WriteFile error: ${error}`);
          });

          if (Platform.OS === 'android') {
            await Share.open({
              ...content,
              url: `data:${urlEncoderType[fileType]};base64,${base64}`,
            });
          }
          await RNShare.share({
            ...content,
            url: encodeURIComponent(path),
          });
        },
        false,
      );

      setIsError(false);
    } catch (err) {
      if (err instanceof Error && err.message === 'User did not share') {
        setIsError(false);
        return;
      }

      setIsError(true);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return { handleShare, isLoading, isError };
};
